name: Wam Income Maximiser Limited
analysis: WMX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.6371. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.6453 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.6371, stop A$1.5840, target A$1.7000. Risk/reward is 1.18:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
